.
Mars has to face his enemies Saturn and Rahu a few houses ahead. So until
43 he will not be settled in life. He will get married when Jupiter transits his
exaltation point during his 4th round, Le ., between 44-45. Jupiter is in enemy
camp and conjunct Mars full of valour and ego. He will not have full measure
ofhappiness. There are no planets in the seventh to him, hence he will have
to depend on himself. He will be employed in a Royal concern as the Moon
is the 7th from Saturn, Saturn has Rahu-Ketu on either side, hence, the native
is a servant. Ketu has Jupiter in fifth to him. Hence, he "will visit holy places.
He will live up to seventy years.
